The data backs that up. Enterprise segment grew 34% last quarter according to Gartner. SMB growth was flat at 2%. The mid-market is actually shrinking by about 5%.

This insight supports the enterprise pivot decision. The growth differential (34% vs 2%) and mid-market contraction suggest enterprise is the correct strategic focus for the venture.
